title: A Gentleman of Paris
writer: Benjamin Glazer, Roy Horniman, Herman J. Mankiewicz
actors: Adolphe Menjou, Shirley O'Hara, Arlette Marchal
plot: A young Parisian noble promises to marry. Visited by fiancée and parents, he bids farewell to mistresses. After marriage and gambling scandal engineered by vengeful valet, the valet confesses to save his master, reuniting the newl...
